name: Tibolone
description: Tibolone is a synthetic steroid hormone drug, which is fairly non-selective in its binding profile, acting as an agonist mainly at estrogen receptors, with a preference for ER alpha.

interactions.name: Anastrozole
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Anastrozole can be decreased when used in combination with Tibolone.

interactions.name: Exemestane
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Exemestane can be decreased when used in combination with Tibolone.

interactions.name: Ospemifene
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Tibolone is combined with Ospemifene.

interactions.name: Capromab pendetide
interactions.description: Tibolone may decrease effectiveness of Capromab pendetide as a diagnostic agent.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Hyaluronidase can be decreased when used in combination with Tibolone.

interactions.name: Tipranavir
interactions.description: Tibolone may increase the dermatologic adverse activities of Tipranavir.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Tibolone.
